title: create_app mutates module-global DATABASE for test DB override
evidence: app.py:43-47 `global DATABASE` reassigns the module-level path inside the factory; get_db()/init_db() read that global
suggestion: Store the DB path on app.config or close over it in the view functions instead of mutating a module global — the current form is not thread/parallel safe and leaks test paths into later create_app() calls

title: POST /books ignores extra/unknown JSON fields silently
evidence: app.py:75-78 only reads title/author/year/isbn from the body; other keys are dropped with no error
suggestion: Acceptable for this spec; note only — no strict-schema rejection was required

title: Test suite exceeds the 3-test minimum with edge-case coverage
evidence: test_app.py contains 18 tests across 6 classes incl. empty-title, non-JSON body, partial update, filter-no-match; test_coverage=0.97 from scores.json
suggestion: None — spec asked for >=3 tests (R12); this is a strong overachievement
